theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Vibrant Travel Energy
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Approachable, energetic, tactile, and highly legible for on-the-go riders.
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A car booking app needs to feel trustworthy (Archetype 1) but also exciting and forward-moving (Vibrant). We avoid the standard dull 'SaaS blue' and instead use a 'Sunset Coral' mixed with deep 'Midnight Navy' to create a premium, travel-ready aesthetic.

typography.anti_default_rule: Do not use System default fonts or Roboto/Inter for headings.

primary.name: Sunset Coral
primary.usage: Main CTAs, Active Tabs, Selected Seats.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding. p-6 (24px) or p-8 (32px) for screen margins to avoid edge-hugging.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Rounded UI. Use rounded-3xl (24px) for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and tags.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Diffuse ambient shadows. shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(10,17,40,0.06)] for floating cards. No hard harsh drop shadows.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense data. Center-align empty states and hero sections.

component_strategies.forms_and_inputs: Large hit areas (min-h 56px). Floating labels or clear bold above-input labels. Background: #F1F5F9, Border: None. On focus: border-2 border-primary.
component_strategies.car_listing_card: Vertical flow: large cutout-style image (transparent or light gray background) taking up top 60% of card, title + specs (fuel, seats) below. Specs as minimal icons + text.
component_strategies.seat_picker_visual: A container representing the car interior. Render rows (e.g., 2-3-3). Seat styling: Available (White bg, Navy border), Selected (Sunset Coral bg, White text), Booked (Gray bg, Gray text, disabled). Use uniform square shapes with heavily rounded corners.
component_strategies.bottom_sheet: Extensively used for filters, route selection, and booking confirmation. Needs a 4px high, 40px wide pill handle at the top. Top corners rounded-3xl.
component_strategies.booking_history_card: Clean bento-style card. Route on top with a visual line connecting pickup to drop-off dots. Status pill on top right. Driver info and price at the bottom.

motion_and_interaction.buttons: Opacity or slight scale down (0.98) on press (using TouchableOpacity).
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Standard smooth slide-in. Bottom sheets must slide up with a spring effect.

auth_backgrounds.description: Sunset over a mountain road, used for Auth/Login header or Onboarding hero.
Yellow camaro on road, alternative vibrant travel image.

empty_states.description: Empty concrete road. Use as a background or circular mask for 'No Bookings Found' or 'No Cars Available'.

data_testid_guidelines.rule: Every interactive element MUST have a testID prop in React Native (which maps to data-testid in React Native Web).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React Native mobile app using Expo Router (.js files).
Rely heavily on NativeWind (Tailwind for RN) or standard StyleSheet mapped to the variables in this JSON.
Do NOT use HTML elements (div, span). Use View, Text, ScrollView, TouchableOpacity.
Implement the Seat Picker as a visual layout, not just a dropdown. Show seats graphically.
For the API endpoints at hotelroomsstay.com/api/travel, handle errors gracefully using the specified empty state images if no cars are returned.
Maintain the Sunset Coral (#FF5A5F) primary color consistently for all primary actions to guide the user naturally.
